description: Business validation rules for BOM creation and maintenance

rules.name: Mandatory Steps Check
rules.description: All 3 steps (Concentration, Standardization, Packing) are mandatory for 0227 family
rules.validation: len(steps) == 3 and all(s in step_names for s in ['Concentration', 'Standardization', 'Packing'])
rules.error_message: 0227 family requires exactly 3 steps: Concentration → Standardization → Packing

rules.name: Mandatory Steps Check
rules.description: All 4 steps are mandatory for 0307 powder family
rules.error_message: 0307 family requires exactly 4 steps: Concentration → Filtration → Spray Drying → Packing

rules.name: Shared SFG Concentrate
rules.description: Concentrate SFG must be shared across flavors within same family+attribute
rules.error_message: Step 1 concentrate must be a shared SFG keyed by family+attribute

rules.name: SFG Item Group
rules.description: All SFGs must belong to 'SFG Semi Finished Goods' item group
rules.error_message: SFG items must have item_group = 'SFG Semi Finished Goods'

rules.name: SFG Stock Item
rules.description: All SFGs must be stock items

rules.name: Valid Yield Range
rules.error_message: Yield percentage must be between 80% and 100%

rules.name: UOM Conversion Required
rules.description: Packaging conversions must have valid conversion factors
rules.error_message: Packaging items must have a valid conversion factor

rules.name: No Self-Reference
rules.description: BOM cannot reference itself as an input
rules.error_message: BOM cannot have circular reference (output item in inputs)

rules.name: Default BOM Uniqueness
rules.description: Only one default BOM per item
rules.error_message: Item already has a default BOM. Deactivate existing first.

rules.name: Active Parent BOM
rules.description: SFG inputs must have active parent BOMs
rules.error_message: SFG input {item_code} does not have an active BOM

rules.name: High Input Ratio Warning
rules.warning_message: High input ratio detected. Verify this is intentional.

rules.name: Missing Operation Warning
rules.warning_message: No operation linked. Cost tracking may be incomplete.
